Home / Service Areas / Collierville

Auto-repair in Collierville, TN

Trusted local professionals serving Collierville and surrounding communities

Serving Collierville, TN

Legacy Auto Repair is proud to serve the Collierville community with reliable and professional auto repair services. Whether you need an oil change, brake service, or engine repair, our skilled technicians are here to help. We understand how important your vehicle is to your daily life in this growing suburban area. Our shop is equipped to handle all types of repairs, from minor fixes to major overhauls. We prioritize customer satisfaction and transparency, ensuring you leave our shop with peace of mind. Visit Legacy Auto Repair in Collierville for all your automotive needs.

Collierville is a charming town with a historic downtown and strong sense of community.

Auto-repair Services in Collierville

Brake Repair

Complete brake inspections and repairs for all vehicle types.

Learn more →

Transmission Service

Preventative maintenance and repairs for automatic and manual transmissions.

Learn more →

Electrical Diagnostics

Advanced troubleshooting for electrical and computer system issues.

Learn more →

Suspension Repair

Shock, strut, and alignment services for smoother rides.

Learn more →

AC Repair

Cooling system repairs to beat Memphis summers.

Learn more →

Pre-Purchase Inspections

Comprehensive used vehicle evaluations before you buy.

Learn more →

Routine Maintenance

Factory-scheduled service to keep your vehicle running right.

Learn more →

Need Auto-repair in Collierville?

Contact us today for a free estimate. We provide professional, reliable service throughout Collierville and the surrounding area.
